Class Neo4jChatMemoryRepositoryConfig

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.chat.memory.repository.neo4j.Neo4jChatMemoryRepositoryConfig
public final class Neo4jChatMemoryRepositoryConfig extends Object
Configuration for the Neo4j Chat Memory store.
Author:
Enrico Rampazzo
